---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability, API improvement, or example gap
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is currently awkward, missing, or blocked?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or API shape you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the practical workflow this unlocks.

## Prior Art

Relevant CMake, Meson, Bazel, Zig, or other examples if useful.

## Acceptance Signal

How should we know the feature is actually done?

- new example
- new matrix target
- new syntax surface
- docs update
- test coverage
